reasoning: The market priced this at 0.02 on February 20. Meta’s open-weight model strategy has historically yielded strong top-5 contenders, but they rarely hold the definitive #1 spot against frontier closed models out of the gate, especially against well-established and aggressively updated AI leaders. As of late February 2025, xAI's Grok 3 holds the #1 spot across the leaderboard, passing a 1400 Elo score. Upcoming models from competitors like OpenAI (GPT-4.5/5) and Anthropic (Claude 4) represent massive hurdles for Meta over the next four months. Furthermore, Mark Zuckerberg has stated that Llama 4 will start debuting in "early 2025" with its "smaller models" first, suggesting their absolute cutting-edge flagship model may not launch or have enough votes to top the Arena by the hard June 30 deadline. Achieving the very top spot on this exact date is highly unlikely given the expected competition, assigning a 5% baseline probability in accordance with minimum constraints.
